title: TAOYE 12 Pcs 18 Inch Baby Pink Heart Mylar Balloons, Heart Shape, Helium or Air Fill, Reusable, Perfect for Valentine's Day, Girls Women Birthday, Boho Party Decoration
features: Pink Heart Party Balloons: There are 12pcs 18 inch baby pink heart mylar balloons, 1pc ribbons and a straw. It is the perfect choice for party decorations, not only bringing surprises to your guests but also creating a joyful and unforgettable party atmosphere

Premium Heart Shape Mylar Balloons: Crafted from high-grade polyester film, these balloons boast a romantic heart shape, ensuring durability and resistance to deformation. It can infuses your party with excitement and vitality

Wide Application: It have been used for all kinds of parties and occasions, such as Valentine's Day, Girls Women Birthday, Wedding, Anniversary, Bridal Shower, Baby Party Decoration, Boho Party Decration and more

Easy to Use: The pink love helium balloons can inflate with helium or air, filling it with helium will make it float, enhancing the effect, can be self-sealed. It is recommended to inflate to 85%-90% to prevent the balloon from bursting
Tips: The balloons is reusable balloons, only one plastic straw is needed for deflation. Balloons should always be used under adult supervision to ensure children's safety
description: TAOYE Foil Heart Balloon Set features extra-large 18 inch heart-shaped balloons designed for party decoration. They effortlessly create a cheerful and inviting atmosphere, ensuring the happiness of your guests. Additionally, these balloons make an excellent choice as a Valentine's Day gift for your loved ones. Parameters: Name: Foil Heart Balloon Shape: Heart Shape Size: 18 Inches Material: Aluminum Film Accessories: Comes with a roll of ribbon and a straw Premium Material: Balloons are crafted from high-grade polyester film, these balloons boast a romantic heart shape, ensuring durability and resistance to deformation. It can infuses your party with excitement and vitality. Easy to Install: Inflate using either a manual or automatic pump. Air or helium can be used, with helium providing a floating effect. The balloon typically lasts for 1-2 weeks, is reusable, easy to operate, and suitable for both adults and children. Versatile Scenarios: This heart shaped foil balloon can be used for various party decorations, such as birthdays, weddings, bridal, baby showers, graduation, New Year's Eve parties, banquets, etc. Different color combinations can be used for decoration of different event parties. Precautions: The balloons are reusable. To prevent air damage due to over-inflation, inflate the balloon to only 85%-90% full. WARNING: Balloons should always be used under adult supervision to ensure children's safety.
